title: Refactor edhoc.rs to use new transcript helpers and remove duplicate/inline TH computations
description: Update all calls to transcript_2/3/4, remove legacy inline th_3_input/th_4_input code blocks (lines ~782-787, ~855-867 etc), ensure consistent use across Initiator/Responder, fix any remaining TH_4 plaintext vs ciphertext mismatch. Run cargo test --features edhoc and verify vectors match Python.
